# phala_ssh_key (Resource)

Manages a Phala Cloud SSH key.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the SSH key.
- `public_key` (String) SSH public key content.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `fingerprint` (String) Computed key fingerprint.
- `id` (String) SSH key identifier.
- `key_type` (String) Key type (e.g. ssh-ed25519, ssh-rsa).
- `source` (String) Key source metadata reported by API.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
